summary: The agent successfully extracted a list of plausible icon descriptions and their corresponding asset types, formatted correctly as a JSON array as requested. Given the visual nature of the input, direct text-to-source validation was not possible.

checks.check: The 'asset_type' values are descriptive of an asset type.
